reason_for_decision: The article now describes integration as a workflow and evidence problem rather than a simple sensor-bundling exercise, which is strong enough to pass.
strengths: It clearly separates the roles of radar, EO, and RF instead of collapsing them into one metric.
The latency-budget and evidence-threshold sections add real systems-engineering value.
The brand-specific section has been removed, which improves editorial discipline.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is structured, actionable, and more aligned with professional system-design guidance.
